anomaly_probe.confidence_effect: This lowers confidence in any universal causal claim. The model should remain an interpretive coding heuristic unless split-source tests show predictive gain over practice-realization, socialization, and institutional history.
anomaly_probe.why_it_breaks_or_strains_model: Dogen's Bendowa denies a clean boundary in realization and denies a beginning in practice. Inherited religious participation can also preserve continuity before any explicit self-negating doctrine is consciously adopted. In both cases, the model may impose a migration story where the tradition presents no transfer, no threshold, or no separate continuity problem.

claim_units: Self negating paths require transformability, not necessarily a minimum self.
Continuity can be distributed across body, habit, teacher, ritual, vow, community, grace, text, institution, and environment.
Dissolution target and residue policy should predict where continuity is preserved or relocated.
Practice ecology may cause doctrine as often as doctrine causes practice ecology.
The model is testable by coding doctrine, supports, warnings, verification methods, and failure modes from separate source sets.

cross_domain_prediction.domain: Addiction recovery and psychotherapy for compulsive self-control collapse.
cross_domain_prediction.prediction: Programs that more strongly deny individual self-mastery should rely more visibly on external or relational continuity supports and should show predictable failures when participants convert surrender into self-ownership, isolate from the group, or lose routine anchors.
cross_domain_prediction.structural_translation: When an intervention negates autonomous control, it must relocate continuity into a sponsor, group, higher power, routine, script, therapist relation, values commitment, medication, or environment design.
cross_domain_prediction.would_count_against_it: No relationship appears between autonomy-negating language and support relocation, or outcomes are fully predicted by generic social support, treatment intensity, diagnosis, medication, and socioeconomic stability.

exact_claim: Self negating or self transcending paths preserve enough receptivity and reliability for transformation through a continuity ecology. This continuity may be internally managed, externally scaffolded, relationally entrusted, ritually stabilized, institutionally maintained, or theologically relocated. The path's dissolution target may pressure where continuity migrates, residue policy governs what remains authorized after negation, and practice ecology may either express doctrine or historically precede it.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Coders who see only doctrinal negation passages can predict above baseline whether later manuals locate support in effort, attention, teacher, vow, grace, ritual, community, text, or no-boundary practice-realization.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Dissolution target and residue policy exert independent pressure on continuity placement.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Split-source blind coding across Theravada, Advaita, Soto Zen, Jodo Shinshu, Dzogchen or Mahamudra, Christian grace, Sufi fana and baqa, and secular mindfulness manuals.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Prediction fails, or ritual form, institution type, teacher authority, socialization pattern, or historical borrowing predicts support placement better than dissolution target and residue policy.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: When the path's primary support holder is absent or confused, failures cluster by support type: effort paths show striving and fatigue, teacher-held paths show dependency or disorientation, vow or grace-held paths show calculation and doubt, no-boundary paths show laxity or antinomian misunderstanding.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Continuity ecology is not a decorative description but a failure-mode predictor.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Practitioner interviews, adverse-event reports, VCE-style coding, and training-program records.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Failure modes are better explained by dose, trauma history, charisma, group norms, mental-health risk, socioeconomic stress, or ordinary teacher quality after controls.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Where support structures predate doctrinal refinement, later doctrine explicitly explains, legitimates, or polices already existing teacher, ritual, vow, or institutional arrangements.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Practice ecology can precede doctrine but should leave historical traces when it does.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Historical comparison of Shinran communities, Soto monastic practice, Theravada reform movements, modern mindfulness programs, and Christian grace controversies.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Historical cases show no relation between prior ecology and later doctrine, or show doctrine changing without support-ecology change and without new warning or verification patterns.

falsifiable_predictions.expected_observation: Traditions screen, sequence, or repair students around capacities to be addressed, receive instruction or grace, register transformation, continue practice, and avoid obstructing the path's support holder.
falsifiable_predictions.if_model_is_right: Minimum receptivity has observable thresholds rather than being a trivial requirement.
falsifiable_predictions.test_surface: Teacher interviews and manual coding with separate fields for entry, warning, verification, and repair.
falsifiable_predictions.would_weaken_or_falsify: Practitioners cannot identify distinct thresholds beyond generic motivation, ethics, or mental stability, or thresholds do not vary with support ecology.

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate applies the structure specifically to self negating paths and adds dissolution target, residue policy, and split-source causal prediction.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Large reduction. Much of continuity ecology is extended, scaffolded, or socially extended religious cognition in Lumenary vocabulary.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for external, material, social, institutional, and ritual supports constituting cognition, selfhood, affect, and religious experience.
near_neighbors.source: Clark and Chalmers, The Extended Mind, https://academic.oup.com/analysis/article/58/1/7/153111; Krueger, Extended Mind and Religious Cognition, https://philpapers.org/archive/KRUTEM-2.pdf; Luckett, Bridging Belief and Social Practice, https://philarchive.org/archive/LUCBBA-2v1

near_neighbors.difference: Asad is not building a cross-tradition rubric for self negation or residue after self dissolution.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Large reduction for the ecology and causal-priority caution. The candidate's remaining contribution is a narrower comparative coding hypothesis.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close for practices being instructed through discursive traditions that connect past, future, present institutions, social conditions, moral selves, knowledge, and authority.
near_neighbors.source: Talal Asad, The Idea of an Anthropology of Islam, https://voidnetwork.gr/wp-content/uploads/2016/09/The-Idea-of-an-Anthropology-of-Islam-by-Talal-Asad.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate uses grammar to predict support placement and failure modes in self negating practice rather than to explain doctrine generally.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to large reduction. Residue policy and continuity placement look like a specialized rule-theory application.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for doctrine as rules that regulate discourse, attitude, action, communal continuity, and the shaping of life.

near_neighbors.difference: VCE does not propose that dissolution target and residue policy predict where transformability is preserved.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate reduction. VCE is a strong empirical baseline the candidate must outperform.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for coding practitioner, practice, relationship, worldview, teacher, community, health, appraisal, and remedy factors in contemplative difficulty.
near_neighbors.source: Lindahl et al., Varieties of Contemplative Experience, https://journals.plos.org/plosone/article?id=10.1371/journal.pone.0176239

near_neighbors.difference: Pargament is about coping and control, not self-negating soteriology or authorized residue after negation.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate reduction for the support-locus axis.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for distributing control across self, God, and collaborative self-God relations, and for treating religious coping as multimodal and dynamic.
near_neighbors.source: Pargament religious coping styles and Brief RCOPE, https://www.mdpi.com/2077-1444/2/1/51

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate generalizes capacity formation into a cross-tradition continuity ecology under negation.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Moderate to large reduction. Minimum receptivity is close to cultivated agency and ethical subject formation.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for agency and capacity being formed by embodied norms, discipline, habitus, and religious practice rather than existing as a liberal autonomous self.
near_neighbors.source: Saba Mahmood and piety-practice literature, examples at https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/00187267251355394 and https://brill.com/view/journals/soi/7/4/article-p289_289.pdf

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate shifts from metaphysical personal identity to practical supports that preserve transformability within a path.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Large reduction for the problem statement, moderate preservation for the support-ecology operationalization.
near_neighbors.overlap: Close for the core problem of continuity without a substantial self, especially karma, rebirth, practice agency, and conventional personhood.
near_neighbors.source: Buddhist no-self and personal identity literature, including Collins and Siderits bibliographic anchors, https://academic.oup.com/reference/62340/reference-article/554142709 and https://openlibrary.org/works/OL2620411W/Selfless_persons

near_neighbors.difference: The candidate names these as variables in one cross-tradition model.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Large reduction. Several allegedly new variables are already visible in the source texts.
near_neighbors.overlap: Very close primary evidence for theologically relocated support, no-boundary practice-realization, guru reliance, vows, solitude, and post-recognition training.
near_neighbors.source: Tannisho, Dogen Bendowa, and Longchen Rabjam Trekcho primary materials, https://www.themathesontrust.org/papers/fareasternreligions/Tannisho-Unno.pdf; https://buddhismnow.com/2023/10/08/practice-within-realisation-dogen/; https://www.lotsawahouse.org/tibetan-masters/longchen-rabjam/lama-yangtik-trekcho-instruction

near_neighbors.difference: This idea consolidates them under continuity ecology and adds explicit causal priority uncertainty.
near_neighbors.novelty_impact: Large internal reduction. Treat as consolidation and extension, not an independent discovery.
near_neighbors.overlap: Extremely close for capacity, residue, support locus, forbidden claimant, entry grammar, transfer, and failure-mode prediction.
near_neighbors.source: Prior Lumenary records in the prompt, especially Every Path Needs What Its Teaching Dissolves, Residue Policy in Negative Self-Practice, Capacity Ledger, Handoff Point, Entry-Claimant Grammar, and Claimability and Support Rubric

next_loop_instructions: Do not publish as doctrine. Treat as a comparative and practitioner-facing research heuristic.

Build a split-source coding sheet with fields for dissolution target, residue policy, support holder, minimum receptivity threshold, practice ecology, warning profile, verification rule, repair, failure mode, and analyst-frame refusal.
Require coders to code doctrine from primary doctrinal passages, then predict support holders and warnings from separate manuals or practitioner interviews.

Add mandatory anomaly values: no-boundary practice-realization, inherited practice, no-threshold, vow-held, grace-held, teacher-recognition, ritual-first, institution-first, secular extraction, and undecidable.
Compare predictive power against extended mind, Asad, Lindbeck, Pargament, VCE, upaya, conversion studies, situated learning, socialization, habitus, and prior Lumenary ledgers.
Run practitioner interviews for concrete failed-student cases and repair instructions, not abstract agreement.
Do not raise above extended unless split-source blind coding predicts safeguards, verification practices, or failure repairs better than established theories and prior Lumenary models.
novelty_adjustment: Reduce novelty from 0.80 to about 0.56. The candidate is useful and testable, but the core components are already strongly anticipated by extended and socially extended religious cognition, Asad's discursive tradition, Lindbeck's grammar model, Pargament's agency styles, VCE influencing-factor coding, Buddhist continuity-without-self debates, and prior Lumenary ledgers. The remaining contribution is a consolidated comparative coding hypothesis with explicit causal-priority tests.

practitioner_test.answers_that_reduce_originality: Practitioners say this is standard no-self continuity, Other Power, practice-realization, guru-yoga, grace, upaya, spiritual materialism, or ordinary pastoral sequencing. They cannot identify new predictions, repairs, or failure clusters.
practitioner_test.answers_that_support_contribution: Practitioners independently identify continuity holders and say the rubric helps predict concrete warnings, screening, sequencing, or repair instructions that existing lineage vocabulary did not make explicit.
questions: Does this continuity ecology name something your lineage already teaches, or does it change diagnosis?
Where is continuity actually held when self, effort, ownership, or agency is negated: attention, body, teacher, vow, grace, ritual, text, community, or something else?
Can you name concrete student failure cases that follow from misplacing continuity?
Does the rubric predict warnings or repairs you would not already derive from ordinary pedagogy, spiritual materialism, upaya, coping styles, or trauma-informed care?
Are there cases in your lineage where the entire language of continuity placement is misleading?
relevant_practitioners: Theravada teachers familiar with anatta, fetters, and path verification
Advaita Vedanta teachers familiar with neti-neti and teacher-led recognition
Soto Zen teachers familiar with practice-realization
Jodo Shinshu ministers familiar with shinjin, Other Power, and non-calculation
Dzogchen or Mahamudra teachers familiar with recognition, guru reliance, and post-recognition conduct
Christian contemplative directors familiar with grace, surrender, and apophasis
Sufi teachers familiar with fana, baqa, adab, and shaykh relation
Contemplative clinicians familiar with meditation-related difficulties

primary_pair: Tannisho, Taitetsu Unno translation, https://www.themathesontrust.org/papers/fareasternreligions/Tannisho-Unno.pdf; Collected Works of Shinran, https://shinranworks.com/commentaries/notes-on-once-calling-and-many-calling/
primary_text_close_read.risk_of_overread: High. Continuity ecology can become an analyst's umbrella that absorbs every support a tradition uses. It may also distort traditions that refuse self, agency, transfer, beginning, or support-locus accounting. Causal claims are especially risky unless doctrine, ecology, and failure modes are coded from independent corpora.
primary_text_close_read.secondary_literature_gap: The audit used accessible primary translations and open academic sources, but did not fully read Collins, Siderits, Harvey, Albahari, Mahmood's Politics of Piety, Bourdieu, Rambo, Lave and Wenger, Shinran's full Kyogyoshinsho, Dogen scholarship, or Tibetan manuals beyond Longchen Rabjam. Pali, Sanskrit, Japanese, and Tibetan terms were not checked directly.
primary_text_close_read.structural_observation: SN 22.59 negates ownership of all aggregates and moves through disenchantment, dispassion, and release, so continuity is carried by instruction, discernment, and practice process rather than an authorized self. Chandogya repeatedly authorizes an underlying Self, but 6.14 also uses a teacher and stepwise inquiry as the way a blindfolded person finds the way home. Brihadaranyaka 3.7.23 relocates continuity into an unseen inner controller. Tannisho relocates decisive support into Amida's vow, true entrusting, teacher lineage, and non-calculating nembutsu, while refusing ownership of disciples or practice. This close read strongly supports the candidate's comparative frame, but also shows that much of the structure is already explicit in primary texts.

title: Continuity Ecology Under Negation
unlike_statement: Unlike extended mind religious cognition, Asad's discursive tradition, Lindbeck's doctrine-as-grammar, VCE, Pargament, Buddhist continuity-without-self literature, and prior Lumenary ledgers, this idea says that self-negating paths preserve transformability through a codable continuity ecology and predicts that dissolution target plus residue policy will partly forecast where continuity is stored after institutional, ritual, and historical controls.
